source_pr.title: expr: fix unstable comparing push down fucntion result testcase
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: yisaer <disxiaofei@163.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/31872

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

The `now` / `sysdate` function result shouldn't be compared between push down or not, thus we removed it from testcase

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test


### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: expr: fix unstable comparing push down fucntion result testcase
failure_signature: expr: fix unstable comparing push down fucntion result testcase
root_cause_explanation: The test compared results of time-dependent functions like `now()` / `sysdate()` between pushed-down evaluation and non-pushdown evaluation. Those functions can legitimately differ across evaluation timing, making the comparison inherently unstable. This PR stabilizes the test by removing such functions from the testcase instead of comparing their results.
fix_pattern: Avoid asserting exact values for time-dependent functions (`now`/`sysdate`) across different execution paths; remove them from the comparison or freeze/mock time.

evidence: evidence: expr: fix unstable comparing push down fucntion result testcase
